name: Open Video Editor
description: Open-source, agent-friendly video editor. Compose videos as plain HTML on a timeline, drop in your own media (logos, product demos), preview with a scrubbable playhead, and render to MP4. Powered by HyperFrames.

deploy.title: Deploy your Open Video Editor
deploy.subtitle: Compose videos as HTML on a timeline, drop in your logo and product demos, and render to MP4.

prompts.label: What kind of videos will you make?
prompts.placeholder: e.g. Product launch clips, feature demos, social ads
